// NOTE: Enterprise-grade Claude Code configuration for MultiAgent-Lab
// DESCRIPTION: Production settings for React Todo App development with Claude Code

// MODEL CONFIGURATION.// RATIONALE: Haiku selected for cost-efficiency in development. Upgrade to Sonnet (4.6) for complex tasks.

// VOICE SETTINGS.// USAGE: Voice enabled for development. Disable in CI/CD environments.

// MCP SERVERS.// PURPOSE: Machine Context Protocol servers for extending Claude capabilities
// MCP SERVERS.// SECURITY: All servers run with timeout protection (5 seconds default)

web-search.// PURPOSE: Search the web for current information beyond training cutoff

fetch.// PURPOSE: Fetch and read content from URLs (documentation, articles, etc.)

// PERMISSIONS.// PHILOSOPHY: Grant minimal required permissions. Deny by default, allow specifically.

// TIERS.// TIER_1_SAFE: File reading, code analysis (no side effects)
// TIERS.// TIER_3_PUBLISH: Git operations, npm publish (requires explicit approval)

// DEVELOPMENT SETTINGS.// LOGGING: Set log level for CLI output

// ENVIRONMENT.// CONTEXT: Development environment (use different settings for CI/CD)

// BLOCKING_OPERATIONS: No destructive git operations without explicit approval (force push, hard reset)
No direct database/credential access without enterprise approval
No npm publish without release checklist

// RECOMMENDED USAGE.// FOR_DEVELOPMENT: Use 'haiku' model with auto mode for fast iteration
// RECOMMENDED USAGE.// FOR_COMPLEX_TASKS: Switch to 'sonnet' model for better reasoning
// RECOMMENDED USAGE.// FOR_PRODUCTION: Use 'opus' model with manual approval for critical changes
// RECOMMENDED USAGE.// FOR_RESEARCH: Use research mode with web-search and fetch enabled
